title: Junior Business Development Manager at Vascon Engineers

jsonLd.title: Junior Business Development Manager at Vascon Engineers
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Vascon Engineers. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Business Development Manager to strengthen our Patna-based team.

About Vascon Engineers:
Vascon Engineers is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in GIS Tools

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Vascon Engineers!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
